parameters.text:
👋 *Welcome to Fintrak!*

*Log expenses:*
📸 Photo → auto-extracted from receipt
✍️ `250 starbucks coffee`
💼 `b:500 vendor xyz` — Business
💳 `cash 300 lunch` — method first
📅 `y:200 dinner` — yesterday
💰 `5k macbook` — shorthand for ₹5,000

*View your spending:*
/today — today's expenses
/last — last 5 expenses
/week — this week's total
/summary — this month with comparison
/report — full category breakdown
/month — month-over-month view
/month -1 — last month

*Find & manage:*
/search keyword — find any expense
/undo — remove last expense
/help — this message
